title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert. Philip Ingram, a former Army Colonel and Intelligence Officer, has said the Scottish Government owned facility will “almost certainly” be...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert
